SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF RYBICKI, EDMUND ROMANELLO, LOUIS SERVED SEP-26-1995, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MUCHA, LJUBA
